summary: Implemented the animated intro sequence for US-010. Created `countSignalFields()` — a pure function that recursively counts meaningful (non-sentinel) leaf values from a SignalSnapshot, excluding metadata fields and sentinel values. Created `renderIntro()` — renders a fullscreen overlay with three staggered lines (headline, signal count, privacy statement) that auto-removes within 2 seconds. Added CSS with design token integration and `@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)` support. Updated `main.ts` to gate the dashboard shell behind the intro sequence. All 19 US-010 tests pass, plus full suite (266 tests), lint, and typecheck.
